description: Critical SaaS features: Email notifications, Reviews system, Admin dashboard, Session reminders

userStories.title: Install Resend and create email service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the email infrastructure set up.
acceptanceCriteria: Install resend package: npm install resend
Create src/lib/email.ts with Resend client initialization
Create sendEmail function that accepts to, subject, react component
Handle missing API key gracefully (log warning, don't crash)

userStories.title: Create email templates directory and base layout
userStories.description: As a developer, I need reusable email components.
acceptanceCriteria: Create EmailLayout.tsx component with header, body, footer
Footer shows unsubscribe link placeholder and company info
Layout is responsive and works in email clients

userStories.title: Create booking confirmation email template
userStories.description: As a client, I want to receive booking confirmation emails.
acceptanceCriteria: Props: coachName, sessionType, date, time, duration, price, meetingLink
Shows session details in clear format

userStories.title: Create cancellation email template
userStories.description: As a user, I want to receive cancellation notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Props: recipientName, sessionType, date, time, cancelledBy, reason, refundAmount
Shows what was cancelled and by whom

userStories.title: Create session reminder email template
userStories.description: As a user, I want reminder emails before sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Props: recipientName, otherPartyName, sessionType, date, time, meetingLink, hoursUntil
Clear subject line: Reminder Session in X hours
Prominent Join Session button with meeting link

userStories.title: Integrate email into booking creation
userStories.description: As a client, I receive confirmation when I book a session.
acceptanceCriteria: In POST /api/bookings after successful booking creation
Use try-catch to not fail booking if email fails

userStories.title: Integrate email into cancellation flow
userStories.description: As a user, I receive notification when a session is cancelled.
acceptanceCriteria: Send cancellation email to both coach and client
Use try-catch to not fail cancellation if email fails

userStories.title: Create reviews database schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to store reviews in the database.
acceptanceCriteria: Fields: id, bookingId (FK unique), coachId (FK), clientId (FK), rating (1-5), title, content, coachResponse, isPublic, createdAt, updatedAt
Add averageRating (decimal) and reviewCount (integer) to coachProfiles

userStories.title: Create reviews API - GET coach reviews
userStories.description: As a visitor, I can see coach reviews.
acceptanceCriteria: GET endpoint returns paginated reviews for coach
Include client name (first name + last initial)
Include rating, title, content, coachResponse, createdAt

userStories.title: Create reviews API - POST create review
userStories.description: As a client, I can submit a review after a completed session.
acceptanceCriteria: Validate: booking exists, is completed, belongs to user
Validate: no existing review for this booking

userStories.title: Create StarRating UI components
userStories.description: As a user, I can see and interact with star ratings.
acceptanceCriteria: StarRating component: displays filled/empty stars based on rating prop
StarRatingInput component: interactive, onClick sets rating
Support half-stars for display (2.5 shows 2.5 stars)

userStories.title: Create ReviewCard component
userStories.description: As a visitor, I can see individual reviews.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows: star rating, title, content, client name, date
Shows coach response if exists (indented reply)
Truncate long content with Read more

userStories.title: Add reviews section to coach profile page
userStories.description: As a visitor, I can see reviews on coach profiles.
acceptanceCriteria: Show average rating and count at top
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Show rating on coach directory cards
userStories.description: As a visitor, I can see ratings when browsing coaches.
acceptanceCriteria: Update coach card component in /coaches page
Handle coaches with no reviews gracefully
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add reminder fields to bookings table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to track which reminders were sent.
acceptanceCriteria: Add to bookings table: reminder24hSentAt (timestamp nullable)
Add to bookings table: reminder1hSentAt (timestamp nullable)

userStories.title: Create session reminders cron endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I receive automatic reminders before sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Query confirmed bookings 24-25 hours away without reminder24hSentAt
Send reminder email to both parties
Query confirmed bookings 1-2 hours away without reminder1hSentAt
Send reminder email to both parties

userStories.title: Add Vercel cron configuration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need cron jobs to run automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Document cron setup in README or docs

userStories.title: Create admin middleware and layout
userStories.description: As an admin, I can access the admin dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Check user role is admin using auth()
Redirect to /dashboard with error toast if not admin
Create AdminSidebar component with navigation links

userStories.title: Create admin overview page with stats
userStories.description: As an admin, I can see platform statistics.
acceptanceCriteria: Show stat cards: total users, total coaches, total bookings, total revenue
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create admin users list page
userStories.description: As an admin, I can view all platform users.
acceptanceCriteria: Columns: avatar, name, email, role, created date
Search input filters by name or email
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add admin user role change action
userStories.description: As an admin, I can change user roles.
acceptanceCriteria: Add role dropdown/select to each user row
Create server action to update user role

userStories.title: Add coach verification status to schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to track coach verification.
acceptanceCriteria: Add verificationStatus enum to coachProfiles: pending, verified, rejected

userStories.title: Create admin coaches page with verification
userStories.description: As an admin, I can verify coaches.
acceptanceCriteria: Columns: avatar, name, headline, verification status, created date
Verify button sets status to verified and verifiedAt
Reject button sets status to rejected
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Show verification badge on coach profiles
userStories.description: As a visitor, I can see verified coaches.
acceptanceCriteria: Create VerifiedBadge component with checkmark icon
Show badge on coach profile page if verified
Show badge on coach cards in directory if verified
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create ReviewForm component and integration
userStories.description: As a client, I can submit a review after a session.
acceptanceCriteria: Add to session detail page for completed sessions
Only show if no review exists
Success toast and hide form on submit
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
